publishedAbstract: - There is a requirement to back up 3scale using OADP inside an ODF bucket in a local OpenShift cluster and mirror these backups into a bucket in `Azure Blob Storage`. The objective is to create the backup once and have the same backup stored in a bucket in Azure Blob Storage.
publishedTitle: Mirroring backups from ODF bucket in OpenShift to Azure blob storage using ODF's multicloud object gateway NooBaa
